video.description: Source video to translate. Must be a publicly accessible URL.
video.title: Video

input_language.description: Source language. Auto-detected if not set.
input_language.title: Input Language

mode.description: Translation mode. 'speed' is faster, 'precision' is higher quality.
mode.title: Mode

translate_audio_only.description: Only translate the audio track, keep original video frames.
translate_audio_only.title: Translate Audio Only

speaker_num.description: Number of speakers in the video for improved separation.
speaker_num.title: Speaker Num

enable_caption.description: Generate captions for the translated video.
enable_caption.title: Enable Caption

enable_dynamic_duration.description: Allow dynamic duration adjustment for natural pacing.
enable_dynamic_duration.title: Enable Dynamic Duration

disable_music_track.description: Remove background music from the output.
disable_music_track.title: Disable Music Track

start_time.description: Start time in seconds for partial translation.
start_time.title: Start Time

end_time.description: End time in seconds for partial translation.
end_time.title: End Time
